'''Xanas City''' was located in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]] [[Xanas system/Legends|Xanas system]]. After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the Xanas City–based [[Arms dealer/Legends|arms dealer]] [[Magresh (criminal)|Magresh]] had medical supplies stolen from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[656th regiment]]. The [[Regiment/Legends|regiment's]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Noran Vran]] purchased the supplies back in exchange for ten [[Missile launcher/Legends|missile launchers]]. The [[Weapon/Legends|weapons]], however, were rigged to explode, which they ultimately did, leaving a crater in Xanas City's streets where the [[Unidentified office building|building]] Magresh was based in previously stood.

==Description==
Xanas City was a [[City/Legends|settlement]]<ref name="HR" /> located in<ref name="Planetnamia" /> the [[Xanas system/Legends|Xanas system]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]] [[Xan sector/Legends|Xan sector]].<ref name="EAOC" />

==History==
At some point not long after the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]]<ref name="HR" /> [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] of [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> criminals affiliated with the Xanas City [[Arms dealer/Legends|arms dealer]] [[Magresh (criminal)|Magresh]] stole medical supplies from the [[West County]] ordnance dump of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[656th regiment]]. On the following [[Local day/Legends|day]], as payment for retrieving the supplies, the [[Regiment/Legends|regiment's]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Noran Vran]] took a [[Transport/Legends|transport]] and a team of [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] carrying crates with ten [[Missile launcher/Legends|missile launchers]] to the [[Unidentified office building|building]] out of which Magresh was operating.<ref name="HR" />

Unbeknownst to the [[Weapon/Legends|weapons]] [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]], however, the [[Missile/Legends|missile]] [[Warhead/Legends|warheads]] had been rigged to explode, and, after handing off the crates in exchange for the medical supplies, Vran took a [[LAVr QH-7 Chariot|Chariot command speeder]] to an area of Xanas City overlooking Magresh's building. At the end of a predetermined countdown, the warheads exploded, with the shockwaves reaching Vran and leaving a crater in the streets of the city.<ref name="HR" />

==Locations==
Xanas City featured a secluded section in which a three-story office building was situated. The arms dealer Magresh based his operations out of the building. The city also had a slightly elevated area overlooking the streets as well as the building.<ref name="HR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Xanas City appeared in "[[A Pleasure Doing Business With You…]]," a short companion narrative included in ''[[Heroes & Rogues]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook written by [[Paul Sudlow]] and [[Rick D. Stuart|Rick Stuart]] for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="HR" />
